## What does this PR do?

A concise description of the change and the problem it solves. Link to the relevant issue if one exists (e.g. `Fixes #123`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. For terminal emulation changes, note any escape sequences or TUI apps you verified against.

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` passes
- [ ] `swift test` passes with no new failures
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or secrets in any committed file
- [ ] No external Swift packages added
- [ ] Runtime-only behavior (PTY, focus, OS integrations) has been manually verified and noted above
